font.title: TTF Font Extraction & Compression Tool
font.desc: Extract and compress TTF font files by entering required characters or uploading text, keeping only needed glyphs to greatly reduce font size.
font.download: Click to download compressed font file
font.seo_desc: TTF font compression tool, supports custom character sets, greatly reduces font size, ideal for frontend performance optimization.
font.seo_keywords: TTF, font compression, font subset, frontend optimization, font tool, font extraction, font slimming
home.seo_desc: Online tool collection including font compression, token generation, hash encryption and more to boost development efficiency.
home.seo_keywords: online tools, font compression, token generator, hash encryption, developer tools, frontend tools
